chatimage.version_warn: Server mod version (%s) differs from client (%s). Issues may occur.
chatimage.no_server_mod: Server does not have ChatImage mod installed.
chatimage.handshake_wait: Waiting for server handshake, please try again.
chatimage.image_loading_wait: Image is still loading, please wait.
chatimage.banned: You are not allowed to send images on this server.
chatimage.file_too_large_compress: Image is too large even after compression (max 8 MB).
chatimage.too_large_upload: Server rejected the image: file too large.
chatimage.clipboard_empty: Clipboard does not contain an image.
chatimage.image_error_timeout: Image failed to upload: server did not receive the file in time.
chatimage.image_error_decode: Image failed: could not decode file.
chatimage.version_newer_server: Server has a newer mod version (v%s), you have v%s. Please update.
chatimage.btn_banned: You are banned from sending images
chatimage.cooldown_seconds: Please wait %s sec before sending another photo
chatimage.cooldown_minutes: Please wait %sm %ss before sending another photo
